steps.title: Use the dictated-roles clue
steps.content: The sentence refers to rigid expectations created by Elizabethan society, then describes characters returning to "socially dictated gender roles." The blank must mean that society authoritatively set those expectations.

steps.title: Reject unrelated actions
steps.content: Choice A means inserted, not established. Choice B means pledged or performed, and choice C means showed or represented. The remaining word means laid down as a rule or direction, which fits rigid expectations imposed by society. The answer is D.
